title: Ceramic Blue Tile
description: Premium ceramic tile with a deep blue glaze and a smooth satin finish.
creator: Lina Morland
styleDescription: A calm, ocean-inspired surface with a tight glaze pattern for soft reflections.

title: Terracotta Ridge Tile
description: Hand-finished terracotta tile with subtle ridges for extra depth.
creator: Marco Vale
styleDescription: Warm clay tones with linear texture that catches light across the surface.

title: Ivory Micro Mosaic
description: Tiny mosaic pieces arranged in a soft ivory palette.
creator: Aya Chen
styleDescription: A refined grid with subtle tonal shifts for delicate movement.

title: Graphite Slate Tile
description: Matte slate tile with a charcoal surface and natural texture.
creator: Mila Hart
styleDescription: Deep graphite tones with organic veining for modern, grounded rooms.

title: Seafoam Zellige
description: Glossy zellige tile with handcrafted edges and a seafoam hue.
creator: Rafiq Amani
styleDescription: Small-format tiles with bright glaze variance and artisanal character.

title: Sand Dune Porcelain
description: Large format porcelain tile with a soft sand gradient.
creator: Nora Dorsey
styleDescription: Minimal surface movement with a warm, dune-inspired tone.

title: Midnight Hex Tile
description: Hexagonal tile in a midnight glaze for bold compositions.
creator: Theo March
styleDescription: Deep, glossy hex tiles that stack into striking geometric patterns.

title: Olive Grove Matte
description: Muted olive tile with a smooth matte finish.
creator: Sana Quill
styleDescription: Soft olive color with low sheen for serene, nature-driven spaces.

title: Calacatta Vein Tile
description: Marble-look porcelain tile with dramatic veining.
creator: Jules Benoit
styleDescription: Crisp white base with bold gray veining for gallery-like interiors.

title: Copperline Tile
description: Metallic-glaze tile with copper highlights and warm undertones.
creator: Iris Rowe
styleDescription: Metallic sheen with brushed texture for statement walls.

title: Mist Grey Stack
description: Light gray stack tile designed for layered surfaces.
creator: Dorian Pike
styleDescription: Stacked profile with cool gray tones for architectural depth.

title: Bloom Pattern Tile
description: Soft patterned tile inspired by botanical sketches.
creator: Elena Brook
styleDescription: Illustrated petals and fine lines for soft, crafted surfaces.
